meaning: vt.领导,引导,致使vi.领导,(道路等)通向,导致,用水砣测深n.领导,领先,导线,铅,(自船上测海水深度的)铅陲,石墨,铅笔芯
examples: He has gone into the lead.
Lead is more solvent in acidic water.
The United States held a slender lead.
His dismissal sparked a collapse which will lead to defeat for England on Tuesday.
Mattel alone has announced two recalls within the past month due to the lead paint issue.
